summary.notes: All confirmed SAST findings are in OWASP Juice Shop intentionally vulnerable challenge paths or require product/security architecture choices. No behavior-changing source fixes were applied silently.

vulnerable_code.snippet: models.sequelize.query(`SELECT * FROM Users WHERE email = '${req.body.email || ''}' AND password = '${security.hash(req.body.password || '')}' AND deletedAt IS NULL`, { model: UserModel, plain: true })

attempted_fixes.fix_rationale: Parameterizing the login query would remove the root cause but would intentionally break login SQL injection challenge flows unless maintainers approve a production-safe mode or update challenge design.
attempted_fixes.functionality_preservation: No source change applied; login and challenge behavior preserved.

commands: not run - no source changes applied

attempted_fixes.residual_risk: Login bypass SQL injection remains exploitable.

vulnerable_code.snippet: models.sequelize.query(`SELECT * FROM Products WHERE ((name LIKE '%${criteria}%' OR description LIKE '%${criteria}%') AND deletedAt IS NULL) ORDER BY name`)

attempted_fixes.fix_rationale: Parameterized search would fix SQL injection, but this code is explicitly marked for union SQL injection and DB schema challenges.
attempted_fixes.functionality_preservation: No source change applied; search and challenge behavior preserved.

commands: not run - no source changes applied

attempted_fixes.residual_risk: Product search SQL injection remains exploitable.

attempted_fixes.owasp: A02:2021-Cryptographic Failures; A07:2021-Identification and Authentication Failures

vulnerable_code.snippet: const privateKey = '-----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY-----...'; export const authorize = (user = {}) => jwt.sign(user, privateKey, { expiresIn: '6h', algorithm: 'RS256' }); decodedToken?.data?.role === roles.accounting

attempted_fixes.fix_rationale: Removing hardcoded keys and changing token authorization requires key provisioning, rotation, and challenge-flow decisions.
attempted_fixes.functionality_preservation: No source change applied; authentication/challenge behavior preserved.

commands: not run - no source changes applied

attempted_fixes.owasp: A01:2021-Broken Access Control; API1:2023-Broken Object Property Level Authorization

vulnerable_code.snippet: const basket = await BasketModel.findOne({ where: { id }, include: [...] }); BasketModel.findOne({ where: { id }, include: [...] })

attempted_fixes.fix_rationale: Constraining basket lookup by authenticated user is straightforward but would alter cross-basket challenge behavior and checkout semantics.
attempted_fixes.functionality_preservation: No source change applied; existing basket challenge behavior preserved.

commands: not run - no source changes applied

attempted_fixes.owasp: A10:2021-Server-Side Request Forgery; API7:2023-Server Side Request Forgery

vulnerable_code.snippet: const url = req.body.imageUrl; const response = await fetch(url); Readable.fromWeb(response.body as any).pipe(fileStream)

attempted_fixes.fix_rationale: Safe SSRF remediation requires allowlist/proxy policy and may restrict accepted profile image URLs.
attempted_fixes.functionality_preservation: No source change applied; existing URL upload behavior preserved.

commands: not run - no source changes applied

attempted_fixes.residual_risk: Server-side fetch can still reach internal resources.

vulnerable_code.snippet: const orderLinesData = body.orderLinesData || ''; const sandbox = { safeEval, orderLinesData }; vm.runInContext('safeEval(orderLinesData)', sandbox, { timeout: 2000 })

attempted_fixes.fix_rationale: Removing eval requires a new declarative order import format or explicit challenge-mode split.
attempted_fixes.functionality_preservation: No source change applied; B2B/challenge behavior preserved.

commands: not run - no source changes applied

vulnerable_code.snippet: libxml.parseXml(data, { noblanks: true, noent: true, nocdata: true }); next(new Error('... ' + utils.trunc(xmlString, 400) + ...))

attempted_fixes.fix_rationale: Disabling entity expansion and changing error disclosure would alter upload challenge behavior and response text.
attempted_fixes.functionality_preservation: No source change applied; XML upload challenge behavior preserved.

commands: not run - no source changes applied

vulnerable_code.snippet: const absolutePath = path.resolve('uploads/complaints/' + fileName); if (absolutePath.includes(path.resolve('.'))) { entry.pipe(fs.createWriteStream('uploads/complaints/' + fileName)) }

attempted_fixes.fix_rationale: Correct containment checks would prevent challenge-recognized archive traversal and need challenge updates.
attempted_fixes.functionality_preservation: No source change applied; ZIP challenge behavior preserved.

commands: not run - no source changes applied

attempted_fixes.residual_risk: Archive extraction can still overwrite files under the working tree.

attempted_fixes.owasp: A04:2021-Insecure Design; API6:2023-Unrestricted Access to Sensitive Business Flows

vulnerable_code.snippet: const card = cardId ? await CardModel.findOne({ where: { id: cardId, UserId: req.body.UserId } }) : null; await WalletModel.increment({ balance: req.body.balance }, { where: { UserId: req.body.UserId } })

attempted_fixes.fix_rationale: Real remediation needs payment provider confirmation, amount policy, ledger/idempotency design, and tests.
attempted_fixes.functionality_preservation: No source change applied; wallet top-up behavior preserved.

commands: not run - no source changes applied

vulnerable_code.snippet: app.use('/ftp', serveIndexMiddleware, serveIndex('ftp', { icons: true })); app.use('/encryptionkeys', serveIndexMiddleware, serveIndex('encryptionkeys', ...)); app.use('/support/logs', serveIndexMiddleware, serveIndex('logs', ...)); app.get('/metrics', metrics.serveMetrics())

attempted_fixes.fix_rationale: Locking down browsable directories and metrics impacts documented training flows and operational visibility; maintainers must choose production-hardening mode and access policy.
attempted_fixes.functionality_preservation: No source change applied; static browsing and metrics behavior preserved.

commands: not run - no source changes applied

attempted_fixes.residual_risk: Sensitive directories and metrics remain publicly accessible.

vulnerable_code.snippet: cardNum: { type: DataTypes.INTEGER, validate: { min: 1000000000000000, max: 9999999999999998 } }; displayableCard.cardNum = '*'.repeat(12) + cardNumber.substring(cardNumber.length - 4)

attempted_fixes.fix_rationale: Replacing stored PANs with provider tokens or encrypted minimized storage requires schema/data migration and payment-flow decisions.
attempted_fixes.functionality_preservation: No source change applied; payment card behavior preserved.

commands: not run - no source changes applied

attempted_fixes.owasp: A02:2021-Cryptographic Failures; A07:2021-Identification and Authentication Failures

vulnerable_code.snippet: export const hash = (data: string) => crypto.createHash('md5').update(data).digest('hex'); this.setDataValue('password', security.hash(clearTextPassword))

attempted_fixes.fix_rationale: Migrating to Argon2id/bcrypt requires dependency choice, hash-versioning, data migration, and login compatibility decisions.
attempted_fixes.functionality_preservation: No source change applied; seeded users and challenge password behavior preserved.

commands: not run - no source changes applied

attempted_fixes.residual_risk: Passwords remain fast unsalted MD5 hashes.

attempted_fixes.owasp: A01:2021-Broken Access Control; API3:2023-Broken Object Property Level Authorization

vulnerable_code.snippet: app.post('/api/Users', ...); finale.resource({ model, endpoints: [`/api/${name}s`, `/api/${name}s/:id`], excludeAttributes: exclude }); role: { type: DataTypes.STRING, defaultValue: 'customer', validate: { isIn: [['customer', 'deluxe', 'accounting', 'admin']] } }

attempted_fixes.fix_rationale: Mass-assignment hardening needs explicit registration DTOs and separate admin user-management flow; direct changes may break generated API/challenges.
attempted_fixes.functionality_preservation: No source change applied; registration/API behavior preserved.

commands: not run - no source changes applied

attempted_fixes.residual_risk: Public registration can still set privileged roles.

attempted_fixes.fix_rationale: Exact URL parsing/allowlist checks are safe technically but would intentionally change the open-redirect challenge behavior.
attempted_fixes.functionality_preservation: No source change applied; redirect challenge behavior preserved.

commands: not run - no source changes applied

attempted_fixes.residual_risk: Allowlist bypass open redirect remains possible.
